message.entry: Unable to access scalar elements for type {0}.
Unable to hash scalar elements for type {0}.
Conversion from {0} to {1} did not return {1}.
Number of subscripts, {0,number,integer}, must match the number of key parts, {1,number,integer}.
Input must be nonempty cell array.
Indexing on an uninitialized dictionary is invalid.
Calling ''{0}'' on an uninitialized dictionary is invalid.

entry.note: Example: dictionary with 5 entries. Note that dictionary is a hard coded and hotlinked class name.
Example: dictionary with 1 entry. Note that dictionary is a hard coded and hotlinked class name.
Example: dictionary with no entries. Note that dictionary is a hard coded and hotlinked class name.
